patterns.pattern: ^(\w+) becomes wreathed in magma, charging at (.+) and smashing straight through the magical shield that surrounds \w+\.$
^Wreathing (you)rself in magma, you charge into (.+), smashing through the magical shield that surrounds \w+ with the might of your stone\-forged form\.$
^(You) launch a magma\-wreathed fist at (.+), but \w+ ducks aside at the last moment\.$
^(\w+) swings a magma\-wreathed punch at (.+), but \w+ ducks aside at the last possible moment\.$
^Impossibly fast, (\w+) brings a magma\-wreathed fist around, driving it straight through the magical shield surrounding (.+) without visible effort\.$
^(You) bring a magma\-wreathed fist around, pulverising the magical shield surrounding (.+) with a single blow\.$
^(\w+) rains? a flurry of blows down upon (.+) with \w+ stone fists\.$
